PP1: T25(95)
HC0: T1(3), T5(49), T6(80), T16(179), T17(179), T18(146), T21(8), T26(95), T27(231), T33(8), T34(8), T36(8), T39(335), T42(78), T43(78), T45(163), T46(93), T49(51), T50(51), T51(51), T52(51), T53(348), T54(321), T57(413), T61(384), T62(54), T63(133), T65(100), T66(100), T67(209), T69(349), T71(129), T72(129), T73(403), T74(403), T76(344), T77(487), T78(487), T82(411), T86(212), T87(403), T88(80), T90(487), T91(439), T92(146), T94(114), T95(114), T96(114), T97(274), T98(27), T101(441), T102(442), T104(442), T105(468), T106(174), T107(148), T108(456), T110(127), T112(127), T113(101), T114(101), T120(174), T121(321), T125(143), T128(168), T129(321), T130(348), T132(156), T135(186), T137(172), T138(118), T143(78), T147(97), T149(97), T150(160), T152(86), T155(79), T156(167), T157(167), T158(167), T160(211), T162(211), T163(211), T164(172), T166(459), T167(410), T168(410), T171(413), T173(105), T175(105), T182(504), T183(119), T185(195), T188(124), T192(36), T193(36), T194(115), T196(115), T197(115)
HC1: T0(0), T2(3), T3(49), T8(106), T9(106), T10(115), T14(133), T15(179), T19(95), T20(3), T22(8), T23(183), T24(95), T28(285), T29(304), T30(304), T31(304), T32(304), T35(8), T37(78), T38(148), T40(335), T41(335), T44(30), T47(93), T48(348), T55(413), T56(413), T58(413), T59(384), T60(384), T64(100), T68(95), T70(100), T75(403), T79(285), T80(105), T81(150), T83(212), T84(212), T85(212), T89(80), T93(146), T99(105), T100(105), T103(442), T109(127), T111(127), T115(101), T116(129), T117(246), T118(246), T119(246), T122(349), T123(186), T124(400), T126(143), T127(168), T131(219), T133(156), T134(156), T136(514), T139(118), T140(179), T141(208), T142(78), T144(78), T145(78), T146(97), T148(97), T151(86), T153(86), T154(86), T159(91), T161(211), T165(459), T169(410), T170(289), T172(425), T174(400), T176(114), T177(114), T178(114), T179(114), T180(186), T181(183), T184(411), T186(179), T187(179), T189(124), T190(124), T191(124), T195(115), T198(262), T199(262)

CHAN0: PP1, HC0, HC1
